explorations_completed.goal_summary: Normalization resolved (tau=beta*t confirmed); Delta_K_A computed for coupled Gibbs state
Full QM vs local TTH comparison: C_full_QM vs C_local_TTH
explorations_completed.key_finding: Structural difference: C_full has two-frequency beating, C_local has single freq. ||C_full-C_local||/||C_full|| = 82.7% at lambda=0.3. Control passed at machine zero.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: C-R interpretation confirmed (local flow); KMS check; experimental proposal
explorations_completed.key_finding: C-R use local modular flow (C-R 1994 Sec 4.3 quote confirmed). KMS temperatures identical for both correlators. Local TTH prediction (no normal-mode splitting) falsified by existing experiments. TTH has no novel testable content for non-relativistic equilibrium systems.
